typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	DATE_PERIOD as string (),
	LogId as integer (),
	pFMForecastDestDB_ConString as string (),
	pFMForecastLogDB_ConString as string (),
	pFMForecastSrcDB_FR_ConString as string (),
	pFMForecastSrcDB_PL_ConString as string ()
}

source(output(
		DATAAREAID as string,
		Quantity as integer,
		Tonnage as integer,
		{Prod Item No} as string,
		{Prod Item Type} as integer,
		Date as timestamp,
		{Inventory Posting Group} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT [DATAAREAID] ,[Quantity] ,[Tonnage] ,[Prod Item No] ,[Prod Item Type] ,[Date] ,[Inventory Posting Group] FROM dbo.[EDW Production Fact] WHERE [Date] >= ?',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> SRCPRODUCTIONFACTFR	source(output(
		DATAAREAID as string,
		Quantity as integer,
		Tonnage as integer,
		{Prod Item No} as string,
		{Prod Item Type} as integer,
		Date as timestamp,
		{Inventory Posting Group} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT [DATAAREAID]       ,[Quantity]       ,[Tonnage]       ,[Prod Item No]       ,[Prod Item Type]       ,[Date]       ,[Inventory Posting Group]   FROM dbo.[EDW Production Fact]  WHERE [Date] >= ?',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> SRCPRODUCTIONFACTPL
SRCPRODUCTIONFACTFR split(!(isNull(Date)), disjoint: true) ~> filterdatenullFR@(datenotnull,ConditionalSplitDefaultOutput)
SRCPRODUCTIONFACTPL split(!(isNull(Date)), disjoint: true) ~> filterdatenullPL@(datenotnull,ConditionalSplitDefaultOutput)
filterdatenullFR@datenotnull sink(input(
		Tonnage as integer,
		Prod_Item_Type as integer,
		Quantity as integer,
		DATAAREAID as string,
		Prod_Item_No as string,
		Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Inventory_Posting_Group as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		Tonnage,
		Prod_Item_Type = {Prod Item Type},
		Quantity,
		DATAAREAID,
		Prod_Item_No = {Prod Item No},
		Date,
		Inventory_Posting_Group = {Inventory Posting Group})) ~> DESTPRODUCTIONFACTFR
filterdatenullPL@datenotnull sink(input(
		Tonnage as integer,
		Prod_Item_Type as integer,
		Quantity as integer,
		DATAAREAID as string,
		Prod_Item_No as string,
		Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Inventory_Posting_Group as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		Tonnage,
		Prod_Item_Type = {Prod Item Type},
		Quantity,
		DATAAREAID,
		Prod_Item_No = {Prod Item No},
		Date,
		Inventory_Posting_Group = {Inventory Posting Group})) ~> DESTPRODUCTIONFACTPL
